description_long: This is a modern, stealth-inspired military jet airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The aircraft features twin vertical stabilizers at the rear, angled outward in a canted configuration, and a single large engine exhaust nozzle at the back. The wings are mid-mounted with pronounced leading-edge extensions, contributing to its aerodynamic profile. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, enclosed by a streamlined canopy, and the nose is sharply pointed, enhancing its stealth characteristics. The surface appears to be matte and dark, likely optimized for radar absorption, with minimal visible panel lines or external features.
description: A sleek, dark, stealth-style military jet with swept-back mid-mounted wings, twin canted vertical stabilizers, and a pointed nose. The cockpit is forward and enclosed, and the surface is matte and angular.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the sharply swept wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and the streamlined, angular fuselage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the single engine exhaust at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large circular engine exhaust and the outward-canted twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the wing and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and pronounced leading-edge extensions; no visible winglets; slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with a large circular exhaust nozzle.
attribute_tail_design: Twin canted vertical stabilizers in a V-tail-like arrangement with conventional horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear; gear doors visible but wheels not extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy integrated into the fuselage nose.
